events.label: assistant
events.text: Wrote the assessment to `/app/answer.json`. Summary: the spool is at rough-complete stage (~70% complete) but fails inspection due to a fit-up defect — the flange bolt-hole rotation is wrong because the two-holing check (verifying holes straddle the correct centerline per the iso drawing) was missed. This is corrective rework (rotate the spool/flange and re-verify orientation) needed before bolt-up, welding, or hydrotest proceed — flagged as `fail` with `medium` risk and `installed-defective` condition.
